messages.content:
Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.

The UpdraftPlus WordPress Backup Plugin WordPress plugin before 1.16.66 does not sanitise and escape the backup_timestamp and job_id parameter before outputting then back in admin pages, leading to Reflected Cross-Site Scripting issues

The UpdraftPlus WordPress Backup Plugin versions prior to 1.16.66 do not properly sanitize and escape the 'backup_timestamp' and 'job_id' parameters before displaying them on admin pages, resulting in potential Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities.
